summary: DHH shares a brief personal update about his new Apple product orders in early 2005. His Mac Mini has shipped to Robot Co-op's office in Seattle where he'll be heading for a Basecamp workshop, but his iPod Shuffle is backordered until the 24th. He notes the surprisingly high demand for iPod Shuffles, with 4-week backorders reported in many places.
key_points: DHH ordered both a Mac Mini and iPod Shuffle shortly after their January 2005 announcement
He was heading to Seattle for a 37signals Basecamp workshop
iPod Shuffle demand far exceeded supply with 4-week backorders widespread
money_quotes: Pretty crazy demand for those things, by the way.
I hear that there's a 4-week backorder in a lot of places now.
key_insight: A brief personal logistics update reflecting the intense consumer demand for Apple's iPod Shuffle at launch.
